values.description: The base url is extracted and put sepparatly for reusability purpose, it can be merged to each request urls if prefered.

Except when creating a new library record, all other api calls involve a specific library to wich you may add a new team member, modify role of a team member or other tasks. The library_id is a provided here as a parameter for reusability perposes only.

During demonstration, the value of jwt_token is extracted from an active session in a browser. A combination of edx-jwt-cookie-header-payload and edx-jwt-cookie-signature is used to form a complete jwt_token by which requests will be allowed.

When performing access management, we can use an existing user to demonstrate add a new team member, modify or remove team member. teammember is separatly provided as a setting for reusability purposes.
